description: Design a horizontal-axis wind turbine (HAWT) blade in QBlade using NACA 4421 for the root and NACA 4412 for the tip. Perform XFoil polar analysis for both airfoils (Re=1,000,000, Alpha -5 to 20) and extrapolate the polars to 360 degrees. The blade should be approximately 5m long with about 10 stations, featuring appropriate chord and twist distribution tapering from root to tip. Save the complete project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/multi_airfoil_blade.wpa.
